speckit.customWorkflows.name: gsd-superpowers
speckit.customWorkflows.description: Eric's light flow: GSD plans the phase, Superpowers executes it with TDD subagents, GSD verifies

steps.name: execute
steps.label: Execute (Superpowers)
steps.command: Take the current GSD phase plan in .planning/ and hand it to Superpowers: use the writing-plans skill to turn it into a Superpowers implementation plan, then execute that plan with subagent-driven-development (TDD, fresh subagent per task). Do NOT use /gsd-execute-phase.

speckit.customCommands.name: new-project
speckit.customCommands.title: GSD New Project
speckit.customCommands.tooltip: One-time: creates .planning/ with PROJECT.md, ROADMAP.md, STATE.md

speckit.customCommands.name: gap-check
speckit.customCommands.title: Plan Gaps
speckit.customCommands.tooltip: Generate gap-fix plans, then hand them to Superpowers like a normal phase
